# S48-T1 child-imbalance analysis

**Date:** 2026-05-13
**Branch:** `mlx/sprint-48-t0-brainstorm`
**Authority:** DEC-052 T0c LOCK (2026-05-12)
**Generated by:** `docs/sprint48/T1/child-imbalance/analyze.py`

---

## Decision rule (locked at T0c, DEC-052)

Metric: geomean of `min(|L|,|R|) / (|L|+|R|)` across all splits,
all 100 trees, all 3 seeds (42/43/44) per shape.

| Threshold | Interpretation | C6 outcome |
|---|---|---|
| geomean <= 0.35 | Skewed splits dominant | C6 projects >=2x -> KEEP |
| 0.35 < geomean < 0.45 | Ambiguous zone | C6 T4 measurement load-bearing |
| geomean >= 0.45 | Near-balanced splits dominant | C6 bounded < 1.6x iter -> likely RETIRE |

---

## Sweep configuration

| Shape | rows x features | depth | bins | iters | seeds |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Higgs-1M-proxy | 1,000,000 x 28 | 6 | 128 | 100 | 42, 43, 44 |
| Epsilon-proxy | 400,000 x 2,000 | 6 | 128 | 100 | 42, 43, 44 |

Binary: `bench_boosting_s48_t1` compiled with `-DCATBOOST_MLX_LOG_CHILD_IMBALANCE`.

---

## Per-shape results

### Higgs-1M-proxy (1M x 28, binary, depth 6, bins 128)

Total split records: 6,300

#### 3-seed geomeans

| Seed | Geomean min(L,R)/(L+R) |
|---|---|
| 42 | 0.3031 |
| 43 | 0.2991 |
| 44 | 0.3174 |

**Overall geomean (all seeds, all trees):** 0.3064

#### Per-depth breakdown

Deeper levels split smaller partitions; near-balanced splits at depth 0
are less C6-favorable than at depth 5 (fewer docs/partition).

| Depth | Geomean min(L,R)/(L+R) | Docs/partition (approx) |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | 0.0365 | ~1,000,000 |
| 1 | 0.1485 | ~500,000 |
| 2 | 0.2372 | ~250,000 |
| 3 | 0.3269 | ~125,000 |
| 4 | 0.4117 | ~62,500 |
| 5 | 0.4735 | ~31,250 |

**C6 verdict for higgs:** KEEP (geomean=0.3064 <= 0.35; C6 projects >=2x)

### Epsilon-proxy (400k x 2000, binary, depth 6, bins 128)

|---|---|
| 42 | 0.2837 |
| 43 | 0.2829 |
| 44 | 0.2823 |

**Overall geomean (all seeds, all trees):** 0.2830

#### Per-depth breakdown

Deeper levels split smaller partitions; near-balanced splits at depth 0
are less C6-favorable than at depth 5 (fewer docs/partition).

| Depth | Geomean min(L,R)/(L+R) | Docs/partition (approx) |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | 0.0210 | ~400,000 |
| 1 | 0.1326 | ~200,000 |
| 2 | 0.2144 | ~100,000 |
| 3 | 0.3104 | ~50,000 |
| 4 | 0.3971 | ~25,000 |
| 5 | 0.4579 | ~12,500 |

**C6 verdict for epsilon:** KEEP (geomean=0.2830 <= 0.35; C6 projects >=2x)

---

## Combined C6 verdict

C6 KEEP — at least one shape geomean <= 0.35 (skewed splits; subtraction projects >=2x)

---

## Verification: bit-exactness check

The instrumented binary (`bench_boosting_s48_t1`) must produce
identical `BENCH_FINAL_LOSS` values to the uninstrumented baseline
(`bench_boosting_baseline`) on the same shape/seed.

Procedure:
```bash
# Run instrumented build (guard ON)
T1="$BUILDDIR/bench_boosting_s48_t1"
BASE="$BUILDDIR/bench_boosting_baseline"

LOSS_T1=$("$T1"  --rows 1000000 --features 28 --classes 2 --depth 6 \
    --bins 128 --iters 10 --seed 42 2>/dev/null | grep BENCH_FINAL_LOSS | awk -F= '{print $2}')
LOSS_BASE=$("$BASE" --rows 1000000 --features 28 --classes 2 --depth 6 \
    --bins 128 --iters 10 --seed 42 2>/dev/null | grep BENCH_FINAL_LOSS | awk -F= '{print $2}')
[ "$LOSS_T1" = "$LOSS_BASE" ] && echo "PASS: bit-exact" || echo "FAIL: $LOSS_T1 vs $LOSS_BASE"
```

**Result:** [TO BE FILLED IN AFTER RUN]
